_comment: Sovereign Agent per-project configuration for AstroFlux.

additional_bad_patterns.hint: shared_preferences is not available — persist state via Riverpod or game state objects.
http package is not available — use Dart's dart:io HttpClient or the existing GcpSyncHandler.
go_router is not available — navigation is handled directly via Flutter Navigator.
mockito is not available in this project — write manual fakes or use flutter_test mocks.

additional_error_hints.hint: firebase_core should be in pubspec.yaml. Run `flutter pub get` — if it fails, check that pubspec.yaml lists firebase_core, cloud_firestore, and cloud_functions.
Call Firebase.initializeApp(options: DefaultFirebaseOptions.currentPlatform) in main() before runApp().
FlameGame APIs live in package:flame/game.dart — ensure the import is present.
